title: What is Growth Strategy and Future Prospects of Power Integrations Company?
text: Power Integrations growth strategy focuses on three key themes: electrification, renewable energy, and grid modernization. The company's industrial revenue grew 15% in 2025, with strong growth in high-power products driven by data center, renewable, and power grid applications. The company expects to achieve $1 billion in revenue through system-level innovation and strategic market expansion. Full-year 2025 reported net revenue of $443.5 million, up 6% compared to 2024. Strategic focus on gallium-nitride (GaN) based products expected to account for more than 10% of sales in 2025. High-power revenue investments driving more than 40% growth in the first half of 2025. The company announced a 7% global workforce reduction in 2026 to better align expenses with revenue and create flexibility for investments in products, people, and markets to generate long-term shareholder value. Industrial markets are expected to be the fastest-growing segment in 2026, though consumer demand faces headwinds from tariff impacts and weakness in the Chinese housing market. Automotive market opportunity remains significant, with the company targeting $100 million in automotive revenue by 2029 through EV market penetration and high-voltage power solution designs.
